name: Sarah Chen
bio: Met during freshman orientation at university. We survived finals together and have been inseparable since. Loves hiking and photography.

name: Marcus Johnson
bio: Senior engineer who mentored me through my first job. Incredibly sharp mind and always willing to help. We grab coffee every few weeks.

name: Olivia Martinez
bio: Cousin and childhood best friend. We grew up in the same neighborhood and share so many memories. Family reunions are never boring with her around.

name: Tom Baker
bio: Brilliant UI designer I collaborate with on freelance projects. Has an incredible eye for detail and always pushes for better UX.

name: Aisha Patel
bio: We backpacked across Southeast Asia together after graduation. Now she's saving lives as a doctor, but we try to do one trip together each year.

name: Ryan O'Brien
bio: Co-founder of a startup we both almost launched together. He went his own way but we exchange ideas regularly. Great sounding board for business ideas.

name: Lisa Nakamura
bio: We met at a local book club and immediately bonded over our love of mystery novels. Monthly book club meetings are the highlight of my social calendar.

name: Daniel Okonkwo
bio: Roommate for three years in university. We've drifted since graduation but whenever we reconnect it's like no time has passed at all.
